description_long: This is a modern residential house complex set within a landscaped property, featuring a main multi-story building with large windows and flat roofs. The property includes a spacious swimming pool, a separate garage or outbuilding, and a fenced recreational area with what appears to be a playground or sports court. The grounds are dotted with numerous trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery throughout the lot. The driveway leads from the street to the main house and garage, with ample space for parking. The architectural style is characterized by clean lines, open terraces, and a mix of glass, concrete, and wood materials.
description: A modern multi-story house with large windows, flat roofs, a pool, garage, and landscaped grounds with trees and a fenced recreation area.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from an elevated angle, highlighting the pool, main building, garage, and the fenced recreation area with trees surrounding the property.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal approach, emphasizing the driveway, main entrance, and the open terrace areas, with the pool and recreation area visible to the sides.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the property, focusing on the pool, back terraces, and the arrangement of trees and green spaces behind the house.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, showing the garage, driveway, and the spatial relationship between the main house, pool, and recreation area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a covered porch with clean lines and no ornate decoration.
